title: Phragmipedium × stenophyllum
taxonomy: Phragmipedium × stenophyllum is a hybrid orchid species. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is a member of the genus Phragmipedium. Phragmipedium × stenophyllum is a result of crossing between Phragmipedium besseae and Phragmipedium longifolium. This orchid is known for its unique flowers and is often cultivated by orchid enthusiasts. Phragmipedium × stenophyllum is also often used in breeding programs to produce new orchid varieties.
